name: format-toolbar
title: Format Toolbar
description: Rich text formatting toolbar with headings, marks, lists, callouts, and tables.

api.description: Rich text formatting toolbar for editor surfaces. Hosts own document state through a controller. Supports headings, marks, lists, quote, callout, code, rule, and table actions.

props.name: controller
props.description: Command surface for formatting actions and pressed states. Pass null while the editor is unavailable.

props.name: locked
props.description: Blocks edits and reports lock attempts when a control is pressed.

props.name: onLockedEditAttempt
props.description: Called when a locked control is pressed. Use for unlock hints.

props.name: isValidHref
props.description: Validates link URLs before Apply. Defaults to http, https, and mailto.

props.name: calloutLabel
props.description: Label for each callout option in the callout menu.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the toolbar root.

props.name: isActive
props.description: Pressed state for a formatting query.

props.name: getLinkHref
props.description: Current link href at the selection, if any.

props.name: subscribe
props.description: Subscribe to selection and document updates so pressed states refresh.

props.name: toggleHeading / toggleBold / …
props.description: Formatting commands for headings, marks, lists, quote, callout, code, rule, and tables.
